tools.name: get_country_info
tools.description:
Get travel country facts: capital, region, income level via World Bank API.
    code: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (US, FR, UA). Returns country profile fields.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description:
Get current weather for a city worldwide via Open-Meteo + OSM geocoding.
    Returns: {city, lat, lon, temperature_c, windspeed_kmh, weather_code}

tools.name: convert_travel_currency
tools.description:
Convert travel budget between currencies using live Frankfurter rates.
    Returns: {amount, from, to, result, rate, date}

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "get_country_info" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
